title: Northrop Grumman Announces Webcast, Conference Call of Second Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., June 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) announced today that its second quarter 2022 financial results will be posted on its investor relations website on July 28, 2022. Prior to the market opening, and after the filing of the earnings release on Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission, the company will issue an advisory release notifying the public of the availability of the complete and full text earnings release on the company's website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

title: Northrop and Raytheon win key U.S. hypersonic defense contracts
text: Raytheon Technologies Co and Northrop Grumman Corp have been awarded separate contracts to continue development of interceptor missiles to defend the United States from hypersonic weapons, two people briefed on the decision said on Friday.

title: F45 launches corporate program with Northrop Grumman among first clients
text: Fitness franchisor F45 Training Holdings Inc. FXLV, +1.35% announced the launch of its corporate partnership program on Thursday, which will bring F45 studios and classes to offices. Aerospace and defense tech company Northrop Grumman Corp. NOC, -1.42% is among the first clients to take advantage of the program.

title: Northrop (NOC) Arm Wins $248.2M Deal for MQ-4C Triton UAS
text: Northrop Grumman's (NOC) business unit wins a modification contract worth $248.2 million to procure two additional low-rate initial-production Lot 5 of the MQ-4C Triton UAS.

title: Northrop (NOC) Arm Wins Deal for Submarine Missile Program
text: Northrop Grumman Corp's (NOC) business unit, Northrop Grumman Systems Corp., wins a contract worth $458 million for the Columbia and Dreadnought Fleet Ballistic Missile Program.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins $21M Deal to Aid MQ-4C Triton UAS
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide additional labor and material to incorporate production engineering change proposals for modifying MQ-4C Triton UAS production assets.

title: Northrop Grumman: A Defense Winner With Growth And A Dividend
text: Northrop Grumman results were pressured in Q1, but the company still increased its dividend by 10%. Revenue growth will accelerate in the second half of 2022 and carry over to 2023 and beyond.

title: Northrop Grumman Total Return Defeating Industry, Sector, And Market
text: My quality value investing screen uncovered aerospace and defense contractor Northrop Grumman. In the last ten years, the stock, a dividend payer, far outperformed the aerospace and defense industry, the industrials sector, and the S&P 500.

title: Northrop Grumman Corporation. (NOC) Management Presents at Jefferies Virtual ESG Summit (Transcript)
text: Northrop Grumman Corporation. (NYSE:NOC ) Jefferies Virtual ESG Summit June 14, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Todd Ernst - Corporate VP, Treasurer and Investor Relations Mike Witt - Vice-President and Chief Sustainability Officer Conference Call Participants Sheila Kahyaoglu - Jefferies aerospace and defense analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu Good morning everyone.

title: Mynaric Acts as Sole Laser Communication Supplier for Northrop Grumman as Part of Milestone U.S. Government Program
text: In March 2022, Mynaric Received Largest Order of Optical Communications Terminals to Date in the Framework of the Space Development Agency's Tranche 1 Transport Layer Program LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSWIRE / June 14, 2022 / As previously announced, Mynaric (NASDAQ:MYNA)(FRA:M0Y) has been selected by Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) for delivery of CONDOR Mk3 optical communication terminals in the framework of a milestone U.S. government program. Northrop Grumman was selected by the Space Development Agency (SDA) to provide 42 satellites for the Tranche 1 Transport Layer program that will serve critical needs of the U.S. National Defense Space Architecture (NDSA).

title: Northrop Grumman Corporation Announces Expiration and Final Results of Registered Exchange Offer for Notes Issued in Connection with Prior Private Exchange Offer
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., June 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) (“Northrop Grumman”) announced today the expiration and final results of its offer to exchange (the “Registered Exchange Offer”) any and all of the $421,664,000 aggregate principal amount of its outstanding unsecured notes previously issued pursuant to an exemption from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”), as set forth in the table below (the “Restricted Notes”), for an equal principal amount of new notes registered under the Securities Act (the “Exchange Notes”).

title: Northrop (NOC) Arm Wins $40.7M Deal for Triton MQ-4C Aircraft
text: Northrop Grumman Corp's (NOC) business unit, Northrop Grumman Systems Corp. wins a contract worth $40.7 million for the Triton MQ-4C unmanned aircraft system.

title: Northrop Grumman Needs a Plan B for Space
text: An alliance with Aerojet Rocketdyne is the most logical solution.

title: Did SpaceX Really Save Taxpayers $40 Billion?
text: If so, then SpaceX also cost somebody $40 billion in sales.

text: Start Time: 10:00 January 1, 0000 10:47 AM ET Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC ) Bernstein 38th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference June 02, 2022, 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Kathy Warden - Chairman, CEO and President Dave Keffer - Corporate VP and CFO Conference Call Participants Doug Harned - Bernstein Doug Harned Okay. I think we can get started here.

title: Northrop Grumman to Participate in the Jefferies Virtual ESG Summit
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., June 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) will participate in the Jefferies Virtual ESG Summit on Tuesday, June 14. Mike Witt, vice president and chief sustainability officer, and Todd Ernst, corporate vice president and treasurer, vice president of investor relations, will present beginning at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. The presentation will be webcast live at http://investor.northropgrumman.com .
